surfaces.cards: bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

navigation.behavior: Collapsible on mobile, fixed on desktop with Cmd+K command palette trigger

kpi_cards.style: Flat card, 1px border, large number typography (text-3xl font-heading font-medium tracking-tight)
kpi_cards.layout: Top-left focused. Title top-left, Value center-left, Sparkline/Trend bottom-right
kpi_cards.motion: Animated counter for numbers (e.g., framer-motion useSpring)

tables.features: Sticky header, pagination, row hover states (hover:bg-muted/50), status chips (badges)
tables.density: Compact (py-2 px-4) for maximum data visibility

charts.style: Area charts with gradient fill, line charts with tension for timeline. Tooltips must be custom HTML/Tailwind styling.
charts.colors: Use status colors (success, error, running) for semantic data, primary for general metrics.

forms_and_inputs.style: Shadcn UI base. Focus rings must be ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-background.

job_details_view.layout: Split pane: Left side (60%) for Logs & JSON payload, Right side (40%) for Metadata, Status Timeline, Worker Assignment
job_details_view.log_viewer: font-mono text-sm bg-[#0A0A0A] text-gray-300 p-4 rounded-md border border-border overflow-x-auto

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in with subtle slide up (y: 10 to 0, opacity: 0 to 1, duration: 0.3s)
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Button active scale (0.97), Toast notification slide-in from bottom-right
motion_and_interactions.loading_states: Skeleton screens matching exact component dimensions, NEVER use basic spinners for full page loads
motion_and_interactions.empty_states: Dashed border containers (border-dashed border-2) with muted icon and clear CTA button

icons.sizing: w-4 h-4 for inline, w-5 h-5 for sidebar, w-8 h-8 for empty states

backgrounds.usage: Use as a fixed background layer with low opacity (10-15%) in dark mode for texture behind the main UI.

illustrations.usage: Can be used in auth pages (split screen right side) with an overlay to maintain text readability.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over gradient meshes meets 4.5:1 contrast. Use backdrop-blur and semi-transparent backgrounds to ensure legibility.
accessibility_and_testing.keyboard: Full keyboard support required (Cmd+K for command palette, standard focus rings).
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, table rows, chart tooltips) MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React app with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI.
Set up CSS variables for light and dark themes as defined in colors.
Implement the Dashboard with KPI cards using animated counters.
Build the Jobs data table with filtering and pagination.
Implement the Job Details page with a mock JSON payload viewer and streaming log terminal UI.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
